sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, time_col TIME, list_col LIST<INT>);
SELECT id, array_has_any(list_col, [2, 3, 5]) AS has_any FROM test_data WHERE time_col - INTERVAL 3 HOUR > TIME '05:00:00' AND id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, time_col, ARRAY_AGG(list_col) AS aggregated_lists FROM test_data GROUP BY id, time_col HAVING array_has_any(ARRAY_AGG(list_col), [1, 5]) AND COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT id, (time_col - INTERVAL 2 HOUR) AS adjusted_time, array_has_any(list_col, (SELECT list_col FROM test_data WHERE id = 1)) AS has_shared_elements FROM test_data WHERE list_col IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_data (event_time TIME, event_list LIST<INT>);
SELECT DISTINCT t1.id, t1.time_col, array_has_any(t1.list_col, t2.event_list) AS overlap FROM test_data t1 JOIN temp_data t2 ON t1.time_col - INTERVAL 1 HOUR = t2.event_time;
SELECT MIN(t1.id), MAX(t2.event_time) FROM test_data t1 JOIN temp_data t2 ON array_has_any(t1.list_col, t2.event_list) WHERE t1.list_col IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t1.id HAVING MIN(t1.id) < 3;
SELECT id, array_has_any(list_col, CAST(NULL AS LIST<INT>)) AS is_null_case FROM test_data WHERE time_col < TIME '07:00:00' OR list_col = [];
